creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
cy          2010-04-26 03:31:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/krb5-appl   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    security/krb5-appl/files README.FreeBSD patch-ac patch-ad 
                             patch-ae patch-ai patch-aj 
                             patch-appl::bsd::Makefile.in 
                             patch-appl::bsd::klogind.M 
                             patch-appl::gssftp::ftp::ftp_var.h 
                             patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::Makefile.in 
                             patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::telnetd.8 
                             patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::utility.c 
                             patch-as patch-av patch-ax patch-ay 
                             patch-ba patch-bb 
                             patch-config::pre.in 
                             patch-config::shlib.conf 
                             patch-lib-krb5-os-localaddr.c 
                             patch-lib::gssapi::krb5::import_name.c 
  Log:
  This forced commit documents the repocopy of the now defunct krb5-17 port
  into krb5-appl. This is in preparation of the krb5-1.8.1 commit. Krb5-1.8.1
  splits the kdc and libraries from the applications (this port, krb5-appl-1.0).`
  
  PR:             145968
